channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Egypt’s $1B Charter Makes It MENA Hub For ScalingTech And Brands

item.title: Stanford AI Expert Pushes Back Against Too Much Reliance On AI
item.description: Stanford AI expert advises: view AI as an opportunity to collaboratively develop improved processes, rather than as a way to cut jobs.

item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro May See Record-Breaking Power Upgrade, Report Says
item.description: A new report says the next flagship iPhone could have an improvement to the feature users love: battery life.

item.title: How To Use GenAI Tools To Boost Productivity In 2026—Without AI Slop

item.title: Sarcasm self-defeats
